label: Stand watch
worldEffect: A lookout on the wall keeps the barricades shored up.
description: The upkeep job (FR-SHL-03 · GDD XI's 'guard'). A resident posted to the watchtower holds the shelter's barricades against the T38 decay — a base you can leave defended, not just quieter. The watchtower ROOM already halves off-screen decay passively; posting a watcher actively keeps the wall up.
